overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark forest at night in a video game. The player follows a narrow dirt trail illuminated by a flashlight, passing dense vegetation and a wooden structure, with limited visibility beyond the light cone.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with thick underbrush

events.description: passes concrete structure on left, entering deeper forest area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path, flashlight illuminating the trail ahead through dense forest

entered.detail: light-colored vertical concrete or stone structure visible at the start of the path
tall dark pine trees forming dense forest canopy
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest floor
thick ferns and bushes lining both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment begins near a concrete structure on the left, transitioning into a dense forest trail. The flashlight illuminates a narrow dirt path surrounded by tall pine trees and thick underbrush, with complete darkness beyond the light cone.

events.description: wooden cabin with ladder comes into view on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail, passing close to a wooden structure on the left

entered.detail: small wooden structure with weathered planks visible through the trees
wooden ladder leaning against or attached to the cabin structure

segments.scene_description: The path continues through dense forest as a wooden cabin with an attached ladder appears on the left. The flashlight reveals the weathered structure as the camera passes by, with the trail remaining narrow and enclosed by vegetation.

events.description: large rock formation becomes prominent on the right as the path opens slightly

agents.ego_description: walking past the wooden structure and continuing along the trail alongside a large rock formation

entered.detail: large boulder or rock outcropping lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The trail opens slightly as the wooden cabin is left behind, revealing a large rock formation on the right. The path continues forward into the darkness, flanked by the rock wall on one side and forest vegetation on the other.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a claustrophobic forest trail that shifts from man-made structures to rugged natural terrain. It begins beside a concrete structure before transitioning onto a narrow dirt path where a flashlight cuts through the oppressive darkness of tall pine trees and thick underbrush. As the camera pushes forward, the dense vegetation gives way to a weathered wooden cabin with an attached ladder on the left. The scene then opens slightly as the cabin is left behind, shifting the focus toward a large, imposing rock formation that flanks the right side of the trail. Finally, the path continues deeper into the night, squeezed between the stony wall and the surrounding forest.
